case_title: ANDERSON ENTERPRISES, INC. VS. FIRST DATA MERCHANT SERVICES CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ANDERSON ENTERPRISES, INC. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT FIRST DATA MERCHANT SERVICES CORPORATION THE JUDGMENT IS WITHOUT PREJUDICE TO ANY CLAIM THAT PLAINTIFF MAY HAVE AGAINST THE BANK OR CREDIT CARD ISSUER. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-13-2010 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $33.00) SERVED AUG-23-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT FIRST DATA MERCHANT SERVICES CORPORATION
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY ANDERSON ENTERPRISES, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT FIRST DATA MERCHANT SERVICES CORPORATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-13-2010 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-13-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-13-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2011 ORDERED DESTROYED
